Icetooth's Claws  
 

Lore Item Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY
Skill: 1H Slashing Atk Delay: 29
DMG: 11 Dmg Bonus: 35
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
WT: 2.0 Size: MEDIUM
Class: WAR RNG BRD ROG
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)

I got one
QuoteReply
# Oct 17 2002 at 5:56 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1594570759382
3 posts
I got me one of these just today on my 16 war he's dual wielding with a blackened alloy long sword and he pumps out the damage now that he got these :-) He's Primary before was coterie LS so its a big improvement hehe :) GL too anyone looking for these I got mine from a merchant in East Freeport for 66plat hehe l8rs
▲ Page top
Pretty good upgrade
QuoteReply
# Oct 04 2002 at 10:20 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591782117422
23 posts
I got there as an upgrade from a giant militia sword I had and soloing got a lot better. Also when in groups I can now put a couple arrows into the target while the true tanks put up the start. Really makes camping fun when start hitting for 22-25 with these things. Not to bad for a little ole wood elf Ranger.

Idiin
Ranger in 12th season.

I have them

# May 11 2002 at 11:44 PM Rating: Decent

12 posts
I have Icetooth claws and do not have velious so if you think you need it to get these you don't. I also have Sarnak Etchiaka I think and a PGT I switch the Sarnaks and PGT out its a very good method to soloing.

D ELF warrior of the 20th season, The Nameless

damage bonus
QuoteReply
# Apr 17 2002 at 9:57 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592793227830
View User Forum
12 posts
im a warrior and the set i have states 1 damage bonus
▲ Page top
RE: damage bonus
QuoteReply
# Apr 19 2002 at 9:15 AM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1591767079068
Sage
266 posts
And I'll bet you are between levels 28 and 30, at which time, all 1hs will have a bonus of one. This is the standard level based bonus, nothing to do with the weapon.

Now, some 2h weapons will have higher bonuses, based on their delay (over 40), but all 1h weaps have the same bonus.
▲ Page top
I love Generous Players
QuoteReply
# Mar 26 2002 at 8:43 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591775405839
11 posts
I got these claws for 10pp from a generous high level player. I offered him 100p for them and he said I could get them for 10p! Sweeeeeet!
He also sold me a Netherbian Unguis for 5p!! He asked me for a low offer so I said 18p, He said that's way too high. Ahhhhh.... I love EQ
Kolador Tasarion level twenty two Ranger

Icetooth's Claws
QuoteReply
# Feb 12 2002 at 1:51 AM Rating: Decent
loeeIV
View User Forum
Sage
68 posts
I'm a Lvl 19 Human Warrior and I use Kodiak Claws myself. After reading about and researching the Icetooth's Claws, I realized that I must have them! True, I get the occational 34 Criticals and 54 Crippling but I can imagine what would happen if I got the Icetooth's Claws. I know that I would not survive long in the Great Divide where these claws are found. Would anyone know if these claws can be purchased from a merchant close to the town of Freeport area or if there is someone out there that could sell me those claws??


Zeegor-Human Warrior
Firiona Vie Server

just got em love em cant letem go they are just great for my 15 warrior they make me hit like a 25

IcePaw war claws
QuoteReply
# Jan 23 2002 at 10:18 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592251396503
4 posts
Im a lvl 12 twink war, abtu lvl 3 my 34 shm bought these icetooths claws and a pair of icepawwar claws fro 450pp. I gave them to my war and have been just switchign them off an don, i cant figure which one is realy better, can anyoen tell me? icepaw war claws are 9/24 and +3 sta, primary only, compair to icetooths claws are 11/29 primary to stats.... i cant figure out which one i should use and which oen i should sell
▲ Page top
RE: IcePaw war claws
QuoteReply
# Jul 22 2002 at 1:16 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591773364215
1 post
I was lvl 2 when I bought my IcePaw war claws from the newbie merchant infront of Oggok. They are amazing, I hit as hard as I did with my 2hs axe, but the delay isn't 49! They only cost me 3pp, how much are they really worth? I got to lvl 10 in no time thanks to these, and my 1hs skill is going up really fast for someone with my int! When I get dual wield what would be a good combo to go with this? Thanks for any info.

Ghaurok
Craknek Warrior
Brell Serilis

"Me Craknek, Me Big, So Me Better"
▲ Page top
RE: IcePaw war claws
QuoteReply
# Apr 08 2002 at 10:14 AM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1591767079068
Sage
266 posts
The ratios are nearly the same. However, the Icepaw warclaw is faster, which for a warrior is better, because it means more taunt. Also, once you get your strength up there, you will get a strength bonus to your hits, and a faster weapon makes that strength bonus more significant. I'd also mention the level bonus, but by the time that kicks in, you should have replaced this, at least with something like a centi shortsword.
▲ Page top
Great weapon

7 posts
My Ranger uses these, at 20 seasons, with a frozen LS in the offhand. Good Combo!

▲ Page top
Great Price
QuoteReply
# Nov 30 2001 at 7:30 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593965808895
6 posts
I have a level 9 warrior that I like to play, and I had my 22 druid in EC. I saw this guy selling icetooth claws, so I asked how much they cost. He said 30pp. As you probably know, that is the price of kodiak claws. I bought them from him right away and ported to my warrior who was in steamfont mountains. I had my warrior pick them up, and I have been critical hitting for 47 damage and landing crippling blows for 77.
▲ Page top
Just helpin out
QuoteReply
# Nov 27 2001 at 12:27 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1591771402928
Scholar
33 posts
I had just created a Dorf Warrior on Rullon Zek and was all ready to go out and kill me some stuff and probly get killed a few times myself, when I get a poke and a question.
"Can you show me where the Bank is?"
I look around and dont see anyone. I shrug my shoulders and figure maybe someone nearby is talking to somelse. Then I get poked again.
"I'm invis" someone says " because I'm KOS to the guards"
In a fit of brilliance I say "oh ok"
"can you?" He says impatiently.
"Uh sure follow me" I say and lead him to the to the bank a total of...oh...30 seconds work.
Then my trade window opens up and low and behold the Icetooth's claws showup!
So the next time someone asks you fr help remember even a grumpy ol' dorf can get somethin for almost nuthin!
Well thats my story and I'm stickin to it!
▲ Page top
Icetooth Claws
QuoteReply
# Nov 26 2001 at 9:13 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592758491921
5 posts
I bought these as level 9 Ranger for 100p, when I felt my Kodiak Claws just didn't kill fast enough when soloing. 22 damage per hit at that level. Excellent. I have acquired a Whip of Strangulation and plan to dual wield the weapons from level 17.
Should be excellent and total weight for the set 2lb!
▲ Page top
Best weapon in the game for the price
QuoteReply
# Nov 05 2001 at 5:44 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591761620482
28 posts
I'm now a 32nd level ranger, and am still using these as my primary weapon. Why? Because for the price, these things can't be beat, and the money I save on uber weapons, I can invest in better armor.

These things will help you take down MOBs fast!

Once I get a bit higher, and the better weapons will proc for me, then I will switch em out, but not before then.
▲ Page top
I LOVE THIS WEAP
QuoteReply

nice claws
QuoteReply
# Sep 16 2001 at 8:41 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591767093064
3 posts
LVL 28 ranger here, i have had one ofn these claws scince lvl 14 and they are pretty nice damage but the delay sucks. i would say they are a great weapon up untill about lvl 25 or 30 then get rid of them i just bought a ebony bladed sword and sold mine for a pair is iksar scaled gloves and 70pp i had always heard they were about 250pp wish i knew they sold for up to 600pp i could really use the cash.

RE: nice claws
QuoteReply
# Oct 02 2001 at 6:00 AM Rating: Good
Naboth
4 posts
Umm...last time I checked 2.6 is a very good delay. I gave a pair of these to my ranger at lvl 1. I used them all the way up till I got my wurmslayer at lvl 30. Dont understand why u would say the delay sucks. This is a great weapon for the first half of the game lvls 1-30.

RE: nice claws
QuoteReply
# Jan 09 2002 at 10:38 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1591758603140
1 post
talk about the pot calling the kettle black, he didn't mean 2 icetooths, a persons says pair automatically when you generally say something that sounds plural, claw(s), boot(s) glove(s), in this game you'll refer to all of those as a pair but obviously you can't where two sets of gloves so...yeah I've gone on and on about this but that post just struck me as plain silly

Very good
QuoteReply
# Aug 21 2001 at 1:56 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591766145533
8 posts
This is a very good primary weapon for upper teens to lower 30's, and can be used with a crystallized sword (same attack stats, though primary AND secondary, and weighs 4.0) if you have the dual weilding capability.
▲ Page top
very good weapon
QuoteReply
# Aug 13 2001 at 1:34 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591758377154
8 posts
these claws are a very good weapon but the mob that drops them is alittle tough hes a named kodack named icetooth he hot for about in his 90s but with average group of lvl 35s or so hes not that hard he coned blue at lvl 39 when we took him down i won the roll on the claws and started to use then over my ebon razor(9/25 4saves magic cold and fire) i hit for about 30-45 with them and crit for my 60-80 alot crip for about 110-130 with em they are a nice weapon and am going to use them till i get my wurm i use them. also these things rock with my onyxbrand(10/24 8ac 10sta 3agi and 5saves fire) so good luck in takeing icetooth down.
